title: nepeta kokanica
intro: Nepeta kokanica, also known as Balkan catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nepeta kokanica include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, relieve stress and anxiety, and treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements to support overall health and well-being.
